---
title: "Three Dimensions of Urban Living"
format: pdf
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{python}
# ── Environment fix (PROJ db version conflict) ───────────────────────────────
import os
os.environ['PROJ_DATA'] = '/opt/miniconda3/envs/ps6env/share/proj'
os.environ['PROJ_LIB']  = '/opt/miniconda3/envs/ps6env/share/proj'

import warnings
warnings.filterwarnings('ignore')

import json
import urllib.request
import pandas as pd
import geopandas as gpd
import altair as alt
import vl_convert as vlc
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.image as mpimg

# ── Load datasets ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
metro_data = pd.read_csv('data/derived data/metro_data.csv')
pollution  = pd.read_csv('data/derived data/pollution.csv')
rpp        = pd.read_csv('data/derived data/BEA_Metro_RPP_2024_Clean.csv')
emp        = pd.read_csv('data/derived data/Cleaned_MSA_Employment_Growth.csv')

# ── Extract CBSA from GEO_ID ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
metro_data['CBSA'] = metro_data['GEO_ID'].str[-5:]

# ── Clean RPP ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
rpp['CBSA'] = rpp['GeoFIPS'].str.replace('"', '', regex=False).str.strip()
rpp_all = (rpp[rpp['Description'].str.strip() == 'RPPs: All items']
           [['CBSA', '2024']]
           .rename(columns={'2024': 'regional_price_parity'}))

# ── Clean employment (BLS "C1018" → CBSA "10180") ────────────────────────────
emp['CBSA'] = (emp['area_fips'].str[1:].astype(int) * 10).astype(str).str.zfill(5)
emp_clean = (emp[['CBSA', 'oty_month3_emplvl_pct_chg']]
             .rename(columns={'oty_month3_emplvl_pct_chg': 'employment_growth'}))

# ── Master dataframe ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
df = metro_data.merge(pollution[['GEO_ID', 'Median_AQI']], on='GEO_ID', how='left')
df = df.merge(rpp_all,   on='CBSA', how='left')
df = df.merge(emp_clean, on='CBSA', how='left')

# ── Merge with CBSA shapefile, clip to continental US ─────────────────────────
cbsa_shp = gpd.read_file('data/map/tl_2023_us_cbsa/tl_2023_us_cbsa.shp')
map_df   = cbsa_shp.merge(df, left_on='CBSAFP', right_on='CBSA', how='left')
map_df   = map_df.cx[-130:-60, 23:52].to_crs('EPSG:4326')
map_df   = map_df.rename(columns={'NAME_y': 'metro_name'})

# ── Fetch US state borders as inline GeoJSON (no runtime URL in vl_convert) ──
_url = ('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/'
        'PublicaMundi/MappingAPI/master/data/geojson/us-states.json')
with urllib.request.urlopen(_url, timeout=15) as _r:
    states_features = json.loads(_r.read())['features']

# ── Name cleaner ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
def _clean(name):
    if pd.isna(name):
        return ''
    for s in [' Metro Area', ' Metropolitan Statistical Area',
              ' Micropolitan Statistical Area']:
        name = name.replace(s, '')
    return name.strip()

# ── Build Altair text table (top-10 ranked list) ──────────────────────────────
def _table_chart(column, table_title, ascending, fmt_fn):
    """Pure Altair mark_text table showing top-10 metros."""
    top10 = (map_df[['metro_name', column]]
             .dropna()
             .sort_values(column, ascending=ascending)
             .head(10)
             .reset_index(drop=True))
    top10['rank'] = [str(i + 1) for i in range(len(top10))]
    top10['city'] = top10['metro_name'].apply(_clean).str[:22]
    top10['val']  = top10[column].apply(fmt_fn)
    top10['row']  = list(range(len(top10)))

    src = alt.Data(values=top10[['rank', 'city', 'val', 'row']].to_dict('records'))

    def col(field, w, align, header):
        return (alt.Chart(src)
                .mark_text(align=align, baseline='middle',
                           fontSize=9.5, color='#222222',
                           dx=3 if align == 'left' else (-3 if align == 'right' else 0))
                .encode(y=alt.Y('row:O', axis=None), text=f'{field}:N')
                .properties(width=w, height=310,
                            title=alt.TitleParams(text=header, fontSize=10,
                                                  fontWeight='bold', color='#444')))

    table = alt.hconcat(
        col('rank', 22,  'center', '#'),
        col('city', 158, 'left',   'Metro Area'),
        col('val',  72,  'right',  'Value'),
        spacing=1
    ).properties(
        title=alt.TitleParams(text=table_title, fontSize=11,
                              fontWeight='bold', anchor='start', dy=-8)
    )
    return table


# ── Build full chart: choropleth + state borders + top-10 table ───────────────
def make_chart(column, map_title, scheme, ascending, table_title, fmt_fn):
    plot_df  = map_df[map_df[column].notna()].copy()
    geo_cols = ['CBSAFP', 'metro_name', column, 'geometry']
    geo_feat = json.loads(plot_df[geo_cols].to_json())['features']

    cbsa_data  = alt.Data(values=geo_feat)
    state_data = alt.Data(values=states_features)

    choropleth = (
        alt.Chart(cbsa_data)
        .mark_geoshape(stroke='white', strokeWidth=0.1)
        .encode(
            color=alt.Color(
                f'properties.{column}:Q',
                scale=alt.Scale(scheme=scheme),
                legend=alt.Legend(title=map_title, orient='bottom',
                                  gradientLength=260,
                                  labelFontSize=8.5, titleFontSize=9.5)
            ),
            tooltip=[
                alt.Tooltip('properties.metro_name:N', title='Metro Area'),
                alt.Tooltip(f'properties.{column}:Q',  title='Value', format='.2f'),
            ]
        )
        .project(type='albersUsa')
        .properties(width=600, height=380)
    )

    borders = (
        alt.Chart(state_data)
        .mark_geoshape(fill=None, stroke='black', strokeWidth=0.5)
        .project(type='albersUsa')
        .properties(width=600, height=380)
    )

    table = _table_chart(column, table_title, ascending, fmt_fn)

    return (
        alt.hconcat(choropleth + borders, table, spacing=22)
        .configure_view(stroke=None)
    )


# ── Save chart PNG (overwrites previous file) ─────────────────────────────────
def save_chart(column, map_title, scheme, ascending, table_title, fmt_fn):
    chart = make_chart(column, map_title, scheme, ascending, table_title, fmt_fn)
    png   = vlc.vegalite_to_png(chart.to_json(), scale=2.0)
    path  = f'data/derived data/chart_{column}.png'
    with open(path, 'wb') as f:
        f.write(png)

# ── Display helper (matplotlib used only to embed PNG in PDF output) ───────────
def show(column):
    path = f'data/derived data/chart_{column}.png'
    img  = mpimg.imread(path)
    h, w = img.shape[:2]
    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(14, 14 * h / w))
    ax.imshow(img)
    ax.axis('off')
    plt.tight_layout(pad=0)
    plt.show()
    plt.close()


# ── Generate all 8 charts ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
specs = [
    # (column, map_title, scheme, ascending, table_title, fmt_fn)
    ('bachelor_degree',
     "Median Earnings – Bachelor's Degree (USD)", 'viridis', False,
     'Top 10 — Highest Earnings',
     lambda x: f"${x:,.0f}"),

    ('employment_growth',
     'Employment Growth Rate (%)', 'blueorange', False,
     'Top 10 — Fastest Growing',
     lambda x: f"{x:+.1f}%"),

    ('median_rent',
     'Median Gross Rent (USD)', 'oranges', True,
     'Top 10 — Lowest Rent',
     lambda x: f"${x:,.0f}"),

    ('regional_price_parity',
     'Regional Price Parity (US avg = 100)', 'reds', True,
     'Top 10 — Most Affordable',
     lambda x: f"{x:.1f}"),

    ('avg_occupants_per_room',
     'Average Occupants per Room', 'reds', True,
     'Top 10 — Least Crowded',
     lambda x: f"{x:.3f}"),

    ('insurance_coverage_rate',
     'Health Insurance Coverage Rate', 'greens', False,
     'Top 10 — Best Coverage',
     lambda x: f"{x:.1%}"),

    ('Median_AQI',
     'Median Air Quality Index (2024)', 'reds', True,
     'Top 10 — Cleanest Air',
     lambda x: f"{x:.0f}"),

    ('avg_commute_time',
     'Average Commute Time (minutes)', 'purples', True,
     'Top 10 — Shortest Commute',
     lambda x: f"{x:.1f} min"),
]

for col, map_title, scheme, asc, tbl_title, fmt_fn in specs:
    save_chart(col, map_title, scheme, asc, tbl_title, fmt_fn)
```

# Three Dimensions of Urban Living

## Economic Opportunity

```{python}
show('bachelor_degree')
```

```{python}
show('employment_growth')
```

## Cost of Living

```{python}
show('median_rent')
```

```{python}
show('regional_price_parity')
```

## Living Environment

```{python}
show('avg_occupants_per_room')
```

```{python}
show('insurance_coverage_rate')
```

```{python}
show('Median_AQI')
```

```{python}
show('avg_commute_time')
```
